Steve Vinter

← Recipes

Udon Carbonara

*with* Sun-Dried Tomato Bacon & Mixed Greens

SERVINGS: 2(4) | COOK TIME: 25(35) MINS

Remember to wash all produce.

Ingredients

  • 1 oz sun-dried tomatoes, roughly chopped
  • 2 tsp tamari
  • 1 tbsp liquid smoke
  • 3 garlic cloves, peeled and minced
  • 1 cup almond milk
  • 2 oz Treeline® Dairy-Free Herb Garlic Cheese
  • 2 tbsp nutritional yeast
  • 1 tbsp vegan parmesan
  • 14 oz udon noodles
  • 4 oz mixed greens
  • 1 lemon, half juiced, half cut into wedges (divided)

From your kitchen

  • 1 tsp + 1 tbsp olive oil
  • Salt
  • Pepper

Tools

  • Large nonstick skillet

Ingredients are listed for 2 servings. If you're making 4 servings, please double your ingredients by using both meal kit bags provided.

Directions

  1. Make sun-dried tomato bacon — Combine sun-dried tomatoes, tamari, and just ¼ tsp liquid smoke in small bowl and stir. Set aside. (4-serving meal: use ½ tsp liquid smoke) TIP: Keep remaining liquid smoke for your own use.

  2. Start the sauce — Add 1 tsp olive oil to large nonstick skillet. Add garlic and cook over medium heat until fragrant, 1 to 2 minutes. Add almond milk, cashew cheese, nutritional yeast, parmesan, and a pinch of salt and pepper. Whisk to incorporate cashew cheese until sauce is creamy and starting to simmer, 2 to 3 minutes. (4-serving meal: use 2 tsp olive oil)

  3. Finish the noodles — Add noodles and 1 cup water to skillet with sauce and bring to a simmer, being careful not to break noodles. Reduce heat, cover, and cook until noodles are tender and loose, 4 to 5 minutes. Add sun-dried tomato bacon with liquid, toss to coat, and cook until slightly thickened, 2 to 3 minutes. (4-serving meal: use 2 cups water)

  4. Make the salad and serve — Add mixed greens, 1 tbsp olive oil, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper and toss to combine. Divide udon carbonara with sun-dried tomato bacon between bowls. Serve with salad and lemon wedges. Buon appetito! (4-serving meal: use 2 tbsp olive oil)

Nutrition

Nutrition per serving (as packaged) Calories: 450, Fat: 13 g, Sodium: 960 mg, Carbohydrates: 82 g, Protein: 18 g.

Allergens: soy, tree nut (almond, cashew), wheat. Manufactured on equipment shared with tree nuts, peanut, sesame, wheat, soy, egg, milk, fish, and shellfish.

Recipe from Purple Carrot.

Recipe from Purple Carrot.
